texto: How would it feel if for an instance we stop being someone’s son/daughter, someone’s father/mother, someone’s husband/wife, someone’s lover, somebody’s employee, a countryman of some nation, a faithful devotee of some religion or a follower of some ideal and live only being a part of this wonderful, incredible and mysterious creation, wouldn't it would be something worth living for?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Bikrant que provoca vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. Ao questionar “How would it feel if for an instance we stop being someone’s son/daughter, someone’s father/mothe…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre fe, awakening, inspiracional, com foco em inspiracao e inspiracional.
